calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On January 23, 2003.
Off Calendar Jan-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Roger Ritter, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney. Monica Weiler was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The following exhibits were marked for identification and moved into evidence: 1) Summary of Accounts; 2) Spreadsheet & bills; 3) Aychiluhim Matter; 4) Unpaid balances on Usher Account; 5) Unpaid balances on the Abderahem Account; 6) Upaid balances on the Sing v Lee account and 7) Letter from Alex Berline dated 9/6/01. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $72,639.61; Pre-judgment interest:$28,168.61; Costs: $471.00 for a total judgment of $101,279.40. Order signed in open court.
